   - **Forks**: 2,899  
   - **Cập nhật**: 2026-06-02

2. **[op7418/guizang-social-card-skill](https://github.com/op7418/guizang-social-card-skill)**  
   - **Tóm tắt**: 🪧 Claude Code / Codex skill — generate Xiaohongshu carousels & WeChat 21:9+1:1 cover pairs.  
   - **Stars**: 2,492  
   - **Forks**: 249  
   - **Cập nhật**: 2026-06-02

3. **[helloianneo/ian-xiaohei-illustrations](https://github.com/helloianneo/ian-xiaohei-illustrations)**  
   - **Tóm tắt**: 中文小黑怪诞正文配图生成 Skill | 16:9 白底手绘 | 少量红橙蓝批注 | Codex Skill  
   - **Stars**: 1,684  
   - **Forks**: 151  
   - **Cập nhật**: 2026-06-02

4. **[GordenSun/GordenPPTSkill](https://github.com/GordenSun/GordenPPTSkill)**  
   - **Tóm tắt**: AI-friendly PPT builder skill: 17 hand-polished Chinese PPTX templates + non-destructive text-only editing tools.  
   - **Stars**: 1,485  
   - **Forks**: 134  
   - **Cập nhật**: 2026-06-02

5. **[Sophomoresty/gemini-web2api](https://github.com/Sophomoresty/gemini-web2api)**  
   - **Tóm tắt**: Convert Google Gemini web into OpenAI-compatible API.  
   - **Stars**: 1,158  
   - **Forks**: 302  
   - **Cập nhật**: 2026-06-02
